runtime_consumed: true (line 2); package_metadata_field: runtime_context_requirements (line 26); evaluator_path: backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py (line 27). This is the runtime execution contract. sprint must not create a competing authority.

9 packages confirmed: 8 androgen BLOCKED_PENDING_CLINICAL_SIGNOFF, 1 FT3 low BLOCKED_PENDING_CONTEXT_SEMANTICS. activated_package_count: 0 (line 9). All 9 packages listed with package_path, signal_id, activation_key confirmed. metadata_misclassifications documented per package.

build_runtime_context_snapshot() at line 164. evaluate_runtime_context_requirements() at line 250. 'disclosed' requirement mode is NOT implemented — any requirement type other than 'present' or 'lab_range_boundary' falls through to missing.append() at line 313, permanently suppressing the signal. Snapshot does not record hormone_therapy_status_disclosed or aas_exposure_status_disclosed keys.
Must not be modified unless absolutely required. If it must change, Cursor must explain before making the change.
All 8 androgen frames reviewed; no clinical sign-off artefact present. CF-BATCH2-010 remains Open.

CF-BATCH2-010 Open (line 76); CF-CONTEXT-SEMANTICS-1 Resolved (line 79) with note that evaluator/package metadata remediation deferred to BATCH2-CONTEXT-ACTIVATION-1; ARCH-ORCH-RESTRUCTURE-1 Open (line 78); CF-CONTEXT-MOD-3 Resolved (line 77).

authority_paths.status: CONFIRMED — file read (imports confirmed at lines 10-16)
authority_paths.note: Existing test file; new tests for disclosed semantics must be added here (Phase 5, items 1-18).

enable_lower_bound: false at line 50. illness_or_recovery_status requirement: present at line 63 (misclassification confirmed). FT3 low has two independent blockers: (1) enable_lower_bound false, (2) illness_or_recovery_status misclassified as present not disclosed.

source_cross_references.note: evaluate_runtime_context_requirements() handles requirement == 'present' (line 308) for non-biomarker context but falls through to missing.append() for all other values including 'disclosed'. The evaluator must add elif requirement == 'disclosed': branch checking the corresponding _disclosed key in the snapshot bucket.

build_runtime_context_snapshot() sets snapshot['medication']['hormone_therapy'] = True only when meds contain 'testosterone'/'hormone' keywords (lines 223-224). Sets snapshot['clinical_context']['aas_exposure'] = True only when supplements contain 'steroid'/'prohormone' (lines 244-245). Neither records whether the relevant question was disclosed/answered. Separate _status_disclosed keys do not exist. Snapshot building must be extended to record disclosure independently of positive presence.

snapshot['clinical_context']['illness_or_recovery_status'] = True set when chronic_conditions is non-empty. This conflates condition presence with question disclosure. A new illness_or_recovery_status_disclosed key must be introduced that tracks whether the question was answered, not whether conditions exist. The existing key must not be modified to preserve backward compatibility.

enable_lower_bound: false. FT3 low cannot receive ACTIVATE_NOW regardless of context semantics implementation. If STOP-gated activation is reached, this field requires explicit review before FT3 low can be considered.

clinical_context key: illness_or_recovery_status requirement: present. Clearance register confirms this should be disclosed semantics. Phase 3 remediation must change this to requirement: disclosed and add corresponding snapshot disclosure key.

remediation_work_id: BATCH2-CONTEXT-ACTIVATION-1_stop_gated_context_package_activation in semantics model. Actual sprint is BATCH2-CONTEXT-COMPLETION-1_runtime_semantics_and_stop_gated_activation. The semantics model was authored before GPT consolidated the sprint naming. Sprint prompt governs; note in audit paper.

8 androgen packages: clearance_decision BLOCKED_PENDING_CLINICAL_SIGNOFF; activation_eligibility: false. 1 FT3 low: clearance_decision BLOCKED_PENDING_CONTEXT_SEMANTICS; activation_eligibility: false. activated_package_count: 0. No activation-eligible packages exist at sprint start.

mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_1: Authoritative sources cannot be identified — any of the 14 authority preflight items at prompt §Authority preflight missing or ambiguous. STOP and report before any file edit.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_2: Duplicate context authority — if implementing disclosed semantics requires creating a second runtime_context_requirements_model or a second evaluator, STOP before committing. Single evaluator + single requirements model must remain the authority.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_3: Disclosed semantics cannot be implemented deterministically — if the snapshot cannot record disclosure state without external API calls, LLM inference, or clinical heuristics, STOP and report.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_4: Broad evaluator redesign required — if implementing disclosed semantics requires restructuring evaluate_runtime_context_requirements() beyond adding a disclosed branch and snapshot disclosure keys, STOP and report.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_5: Orchestrator changes required — if any orchestrator file must change to support disclosed semantics, STOP and report. Orchestrator is explicitly not in scope.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_6: Package remediation would require threshold changes — Phase 3 touches only runtime_context_requirements metadata. If any threshold, clinical wording, signal_id, or activation_key change would be required, STOP.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_7: Package remediation would require signal_id or activation_key changes — STOP immediately.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_8: Androgen clinical sign-off absent — androgen packages must not receive ACTIVATE_NOW. All 8 must remain BLOCKED_PENDING_CLINICAL_SIGNOFF at Phase 7.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_9: FT3 low activation requires ungoverned illness/medication logic — if implementing the disclosed requirement for illness_or_recovery_status requires any clinical heuristic or LLM call, STOP.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_10: Active package behaviour changes unexpectedly — if any currently active signal's evaluation result changes after disclosed semantics are implemented, STOP before commit.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_11: Validators fail — any run_architecture_validation_gate.py, validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py, or validate_context_modifier_catalogue.py failure. STOP.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_12: Tests fail — any existing regression test failure. STOP.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_13: Package validators fail — any validate_knowledge_package.py failure for a touched package. STOP.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_14: Activation approval phrase not given — stop before Phase 8. Sprint may still complete as implementation-only sprint.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_15: Rollback path cannot be defined — STOP before commit if rollback is unclear.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_16: Disclosed semantics implemented in requirement evaluation but snapshot does not record disclosure state — this is the Amendment 6 addition. Do not implement only half of the coordinated change.
mandatory_stop_conditions_for_cursor.STOP_17: FT3 low recommended for ACTIVATE_NOW while enable_lower_bound remains false — STOP. This is an independent activation-layer blocker.

behavioural_hardening.scope_defined: CONFIRMED — Expected changed files listed at prompt §Expected changed files. Any file outside that list requires STOP and explanation before editing.
behavioural_hardening.regression_targets: CONFIRMED — backend/tests/regression/test_runtime_context_evaluation.py must pass (all existing tests + 18 new tests); run_architecture_validation_gate.py must pass; validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py must pass; validate_context_modifier_catalogue.py must pass; validate_knowledge_package.py for each touched package must pass. All output must be pasted in full.
behavioural_hardening.determinism_preserved: CONFIRMED — disclosed semantics implementation must be deterministic fail-closed. No clinical thresholds, no LLM calls, no heuristics. Snapshot reads from disclosed questionnaire fields only.
behavioural_hardening.output_structure_unchanged: CONFIRMED — existing active package signal evaluation results must be unchanged. present requirement mode at evaluator line 308 must not be modified.
behavioural_hardening.backward_compatibility: CONFIRMED REQUIRED — evaluate_runtime_context_requirements() lines 285-311 (present and lab_range_boundary handling) must not be changed. Active packages not in scope of this sprint must evaluate identically before and after.
behavioural_hardening.two_coordinated_changes_required: CONFIRMED — Amendment 3 is architecturally correct. Two changes must be made together in runtime_context_evaluator.py: (1) build_runtime_context_snapshot() must record disclosure state independently of positive presence (new _status_disclosed keys); (2) evaluate_runtime_context_requirements() must add a disclosed branch at ~line 311 that checks for those _status_disclosed keys. Implementing only one half triggers STOP_16.
behavioural_hardening.package_inventory: CONFIRMED — 9 packages, all inactive. 8 androgen BLOCKED_PENDING_CLINICAL_SIGNOFF, 1 FT3 low BLOCKED_PENDING_CONTEXT_SEMANTICS. At Phase 7, no androgen package may receive ACTIVATE_NOW. FT3 low may not receive ACTIVATE_NOW while enable_lower_bound: false.
behavioural_hardening.carry_forward_handling: CF-CONTEXT-SEMANTICS-1 may be updated to Resolved if evaluator disclosed mode is fully implemented and tested. CF-BATCH2-010 must remain Open. ARCH-ORCH-RESTRUCTURE-1 must remain Open. Do not create one carry-forward per androgen marker.
behavioural_hardening.no_merge: CONFIRMED — HIGH risk route: Cursor implementation → Claude audit → GPT architectural review → human merge approval. No merge without GPT review.

hardening_notes: Sprint may proceed to Stage 3 (kernel start). Key facts for Cursor: (1) The core implementation gap is confirmed from file reads — runtime_context_evaluator.py line 313 falls through on unknown requirement types and the snapshot records no disclosure state. Two coordinated changes required in that one file. (2) All 9 packages remain inactive and must remain so after this sprint unless STOP-gated activation is approved. No androgen package can receive ACTIVATE_NOW due to CF-BATCH2-010. (3) FT3 low has TWO independent blockers: enable_lower_bound: false (signal_library.yaml line 50) and illness_or_recovery_status misclassified as present not disclosed (signal_library.yaml line 63). (4) The semantics model remediation_work_id field references BATCH2-CONTEXT-ACTIVATION-1 — this is stale naming predating the GPT sprint consolidation; note in audit paper, not a blocker. (5) illness_or_recovery_status in the snapshot (evaluator line 236-237) conflates condition presence with disclosure — a new _disclosed key must be introduced without modifying the existing key. (6) If activation approval phrase 'APPROVE BATCH2 CONTEXT RUNTIME ACTIVATION' is received, only packages with ACTIVATE_NOW recommendation may be activated; given CF-BATCH2-010, this is unlikely for any androgen package in this sprint.
